channel.title: Mobile Menu not closing after click
channel.description:
Hi guys,
I am wondering why the mobile menu is not working. The menu doesn't close when selected/click the menu item. Here's my website https://www.panlasangpinoyrecipes.com/
Thanks

item.title: Mobile Menu not closing after click
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Hi @codepinoys,

You need a special Link component to use in the menu, like for instance this one that I use:

github.com

aamodtgroup/aamodtgroup/blob/main/packages/agtech/src/components/link.js

import { connect, useConnect } from "frontity";
import Link from "@frontity/components/link";

/**
 * The MarsLink component, which is a wrapper on top of the {@link Link}
 * component.
 *
 * @param props - It accepts the same props than the {@link Link} component.
 *
 * @example
 * ```js
 * <MarsLink link="/some-post">
 *   <div>Some Post</div>
 * </MarsLink>
 * ```
 *
 * @returns A {@link Link} component, which returns an HTML anchor element.
 */
const MarsLink = ({ children, ...props }) => {
  const { state, actions } = useConnect();
This file has been truncated. show original

Read full topic
item.source: Mobile Menu not closing after click

Hi guys,

I am wondering why the mobile menu is not working. The menu doesn’t close when selected/click the menu item. Here’s my website https://www.panlasangpinoyrecipes.com/
